a.text:
*gasps with effort and bearing down* Oh! The pain, the pressure, the intensity! YES! I can feel it! gasping breathing hard

Our beautiful baby is almost here! baby is coming!

*WAAAAAHHHHHHH!!!* *SCREAMING CRY CRY CRY!!!* BABY CRY! CRY CRY CRY!

*loud wailing and whimpering* WAAAHHHHH!!! *passionate crying and wailing* cry cry cry
